build_note: IDL generation skipped (proc-macro2/anchor-syn incompatibility with Rust 1.95). Tests use raw instruction construction with manual discriminators.

tests.name: registers a new HXQ tensor asset
rejects promotion with cosine below threshold
promotes asset with valid receipts and cosine >= 0.998
submits risk attestation on active asset
transfers active asset with risk attestation
rejects transfer from old owner after ownership change

transitions: promote_asset -> Active (requires fidelity + behavioral receipts + cosine >= 0.998)
transfer_asset -> ownership change (Active only + risk attestation required)

account_layout.fields: owner(32) + content_hash(32) + original_hash(32) + codec(1) + group_size(2) + bits_per_weight(1) + cosine_min(4) + ppl_delta_pct(4) + status(1) + fidelity_receipt_hash(32) + behavioral_receipt_hash(32) + risk_attestation_hash(32) + transfer_count(4) + created_at(8) + updated_at(8) + bump(1)

what_this_is_NOT: Not deployed to any public network
No KYC verification — accepts hash attestations only
No custody — owner is a signer, not a custodian
next_steps: Deploy to devnet (blocked on SOL airdrop rate limit)
Resolve IDL generation (proc-macro2 fix or anchor version bump)
Add USDC payment leg (SPL token transfer)
